raises.purpose: Expansion of existing business and working capital, aligned with CARE Ratings' Jan 2025 note of a planned raise of up to Rs250cr via preferential allotment/private placement/QIP
raises.source: CARE Ratings Aug 2025 rationale; press reports
raises.note: Materially improved capital structure: consolidated TOL/TNW improved from 6.99x (Mar 2024) to 2.57x (Mar 2025), cited by CARE as a driver of its Aug 2025 outlook upgrade to Positive.
